---
title: 'Dreams. Hopes. Goals.'
date: '2011-09-01T04:21:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8432653386332857437'
blogger_filename: '/2011/08/dreams-hopes-goals.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'EMIC'
  - 'study'
---

<br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><br /><br />Somewhat disjointed: Notes from various teachings this week... I felt it was important to write it down somewhere.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">DREAM</span></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Charles Capps wrote that Hope is the Goal Setter of your Faith just as the thermostat is the goal setter for the air conditioning unit. Love is the power and connection as wiring and electricity are to the process.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">A man walks into the room and feels that it is HOT. He checks the temperature gauge and finds it is 90*. He begins to set the thermostat to 70*. A&nbsp;religious&nbsp;person comes along and says, you can't set that to 70*, you are lying to the machine, it's not 70*.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Sounds silly, but people do it all the time. You can't say you are healed when you are sick, you are lying. You can't say you are prosperous when you are broke and in debt, you are lying. No, I'm not lying. I'm setting the thermostat in order to change my environment.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Jim Carry once wrote a check to himself dated five years in advance for $10,000,000 for acting services rendered. He carried that check everywhere he went. At the time he was a broke&nbsp;Canadian&nbsp;comic, a total unknown. By the date on the check he'd released three major motion pictures and was drawing over $20,000,000 per picture. What did he do? He set the thermostat.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">The thermostat is known as Hope in the bible. We also call it Dreams. Goals. Vision. Imaginations. Desires. These are all words to describe the thermostat of our lives.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Faith is the substance of our hope as the Air Unit is the substance of our cooler air. Without the unit the are would not cool. Without the Thermostat the unit would not have any goal set to accomplish and would sit, totally prepared to do the job and never produce anything.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Love is the POWER. Without electricity the Air Unit and the Thermostat would both be inoperative. You need power to connect the two and cause production. Love is the power that connects you Hope(Goal Setter) and your Faith (Producer of Substance Hoped for.)<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">It is not loving yourself, others, enemies, or even God that is most important here. It is tapping into, believing, and being TOTALLY convinced of, HIS LOVE for YOU! When you are totally enraptured with His Love for you, than you will be unable to doubt him ever again. Without doubt you are able to&nbsp;receive&nbsp;by faith the things you hope for.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Pastor Terri Savelle Foy talked about dreams. Without dreams you have no goal set for the fertile ground of your heart to produce. Putting dreams into writing sets the GPS of your heart.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Faith and Love protect your heart as a breastplate of armor, Hope protects your mind as a helmet.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Hope requires you to be consistent and hold on. You cannot waiver. If you doubt/waiver, you do not&nbsp;receive.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">Disney saw his vision come to pass, the dream was so big on the inside that even though he had died long before the corporation is still expanding today. It still hasn't breached the boundaries of Disney's heart.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">You cannot let finances drag you down. I do not serve money. I serve God! Money serves me!<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">If I let pressure of finances get to me, I'll stop dreaming or put hopes on the shelf. I must press harder into the dreams during times of pressure. I speak to circumstances and tell them how to react and what to do.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Hebrews+11:1&amp;version=NKJV"><span style="color: black;">Hebrews 11:1</span></a></span></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><br />[&nbsp;<i>By&nbsp;<b>Faith</b>&nbsp;We Understand</i>&nbsp;] Now&nbsp;<b>faith</b>&nbsp;is the substance of things&nbsp;<b>hope</b>d for, the evidence of things not seen.</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Hebrews+10:23&amp;version=NKJV"><span style="color: black;">Hebrews 10:23</span></a></span></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><br />Let us hold fast the confession of our&nbsp;<b>hope</b>&nbsp;without wavering, for He who promised is<b>faith</b>ful.</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">Habakkuk 2:2</span></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="color: black; font-size: 8pt;">New King James Version (NKJV)</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10pt;">The Just Live by Faith</span></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><b><sup><span style="color: black; font-size: 9pt;">2</span></sup></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;Then the LORD answered me and said:<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; “ Write the vision<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;And make&nbsp;<i>it</i>&nbsp;plain on tablets,<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;That he may run who reads it.&nbsp;<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Habakkuk%202:2&amp;version=NKJV"><span style="color: black;">http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Habakkuk%202:2&amp;version=NKJV</span></a><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">1 Corinthians 13:13</span></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><br />And now abide&nbsp;<b>faith</b>,&nbsp;<b>hope</b>, love, these three; but the greatest of these is love.</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">2 Corinthians 10:14-16</span></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="color: black; font-size: 8pt;">New King James Version (NKJV)</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><b><sup><span style="color: black; font-size: 9pt;">14</span></sup></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;For we are not overextending ourselves (as though&nbsp;<i>our authority</i>&nbsp;did not extend to you), for it was to you that we came with the gospel of Christ;&nbsp;</span><b><sup><span style="color: black; font-size: 9pt;">15</span></sup></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;not boasting of things beyond measure,&nbsp;<i>that is,</i>&nbsp;in other men’s labors, but having hope,&nbsp;<i>that</i>&nbsp;as your faith is increased, we shall be greatly enlarged by you in our sphere,&nbsp;</span><b><sup><span style="color: black; font-size: 9pt;">16</span></sup></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;">&nbsp;to preach the gospel in the&nbsp;<i>regions</i>&nbsp;beyond you,&nbsp;<i>and</i>&nbsp;not to boast in another man’s sphere of accomplishment.<o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">Colossians 1:23</span></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><br />if indeed you continue in the&nbsp;<b>faith</b>, grounded and steadfast, and are not moved away from the&nbsp;<b>hope</b>&nbsp;of the gospel which you heard, which was preached to every creature under heaven, of which I, Paul, became a minister.</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">1 Thessalonians 1:3</span></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><br /></span><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">remembering without ceasing your work of&nbsp;<b>faith</b>, labor of love, and patience of&nbsp;<b>hope</b>&nbsp;in our Lord Jesus Christ in the sight of our God and Father,</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">1 Thessalonians 5:8</span></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;"><br />But let us who are of the day be sober, putting on the breastplate of&nbsp;<b>faith</b>&nbsp;and love, and as a helmet the&nbsp;<b>hope</b>&nbsp;of salvation.</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">James 1:5-8</span></b><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">New King James Version (NKJV)</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><u2:p></u2:p><b><sup><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 7pt;">5</span></sup></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">&nbsp;If any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God, who gives to all liberally and without reproach, and it will be given to him.&nbsp;</span><b><sup><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 7pt;">6</span></sup></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">&nbsp;But let him ask in faith, with no doubting, for he who doubts is like a wave of the sea driven and tossed by the wind.&nbsp;</span><b><sup><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 7pt;">7</span></sup></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">&nbsp;For let not that man suppose that he will receive anything from the Lord;&nbsp;</span><b><sup><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 7pt;">8</span></sup></b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">&nbsp;<i>he is</i>&nbsp;a double-minded man, unstable in all his ways.</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p> <br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; color: black; font-size: 10.5pt;">DW</span><span style="color: black; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><u1:p></u1:p></div><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: white; font-size: 16px;"></span>
